name: Trend labour productivity growth
plain_english: Slow-moving trend in real GDP per hour worked. Mean-reverts to a steady-state value.
transmission_channel: Drives TY potential growth and equilibrium wage levels via PAE.

name: Trend working-age population growth
plain_english: Slow-moving trend in working-age population. Mean-reverts to a steady-state value.
transmission_channel: Drives TY potential growth and labour supply.

name: Trend average hours-worked growth
plain_english: Slow-moving trend in hours per person.

name: Inflation expectations
plain_english: Slow-moving inflation expectations anchored to the 2.5% target.
transmission_channel: Enters wages (PW), prices (PTM, PC, PG), and interest-rate equations.

name: NAIRU (non-accelerating-inflation rate of unemployment)
plain_english: The unobserved equilibrium unemployment rate. Drives LURGAP.

name: Neutral real interest rate
plain_english: Slow-moving equilibrium real cash rate. Anchors NCR via Taylor rule.
transmission_channel: Drives NCR; transmits to N2R N10R RTWI.

name: Household consumption
plain_english: Real household consumption growth as a function of disposable income net wealth and the real cash rate.
transmission_channel: RC -> NC NHS DFD GNE Y; via Y -> LE LUR PW.

name: Household non-labour income
plain_english: Nominal household income excluding compensation of employees.

name: Household financial assets
plain_english: Nominal household financial wealth.

name: Household liabilities
plain_english: Household debt stock.

name: Household credit
plain_english: Mortgage credit; depends on house prices dwelling stock and the mortgage rate.

name: Household consumption of fixed capital
plain_english: Slow-moving depreciation on household durables.
transmission_channel: Subtraction term in net household saving NHS.

name: Dwelling investment
plain_english: New residential construction; responds to house prices the mortgage rate and trend population.
transmission_channel: ID -> KID PH NHC NHNFA OTC DFD Y.

name: Established house prices
plain_english: Quarterly growth in established dwelling prices.
transmission_channel: PH -> RPH NHC NHNFA HNW -> RC.

name: Consumer price index – rents
plain_english: Rents as a share of consumption deflator; mean-reverts to a unit-labour-cost benchmark.

name: Ownership transfer costs
plain_english: Costs associated with property transactions.

name: Non-mining business investment
plain_english: Non-mining capital expenditure; depends on GNE the user cost of capital and the relative price of investment goods.

name: Mining (resources) business investment
plain_english: Mining sector capex; depends on resource export prices.
transmission_channel: IBRE -> KIBRE IB; KIBRE drives XRE through the production function.

name: Inventories
plain_english: Stocks; closes to a target stock-to-output ratio.
transmission_channel: KV -> V (change in inventories) -> GNE Y.

name: Government consumption
plain_english: Real public consumption; closes to output adjusted for the unemployment gap.

name: Government investment
plain_english: Real public investment; closes to output adjusted for the unemployment gap.

name: Mining exports
plain_english: Resource export volumes; depends on the lagged mining capital stock.
transmission_channel: XRE -> X NX -> Y NY TOT.

name: Manufactured exports
plain_english: Manufactured export volumes; depends on world GDP and the real export-weighted exchange rate.

name: Services exports
plain_english: Service export volumes (tourism education etc.).

name: Agricultural exports
plain_english: Total agricultural exports = XAGEXRAIN + RAIN.

name: Agricultural exports excluding rain-affected output
plain_english: Agricultural exports adjusted for the rain shock.

name: Other exports
plain_english: Residual exports category.

name: Imports
plain_english: Import volumes as a function of import-adjusted demand and relative import prices.

name: Import-adjusted demand
plain_english: Cobb-Douglas weighted aggregate of demand components by import intensity.

name: Trimmed mean inflation
plain_english: Quarterly trimmed-mean CPI inflation; Phillips curve in the unemployment gap with inflation expectations.
transmission_channel: PTM -> P PC PG PID PIBN PIBRE PXM RTWI NCR.

name: Headline CPI
plain_english: Headline CPI as a weighted average of trimmed mean and oil-price effects.
transmission_channel: P is a reported aggregate; minimal feedback.

name: CPI excluding volatile items
plain_english: Tracks PTM up to a level scaling.

name: Consumer expenditure deflator
plain_english: Consumption deflator; closes to PTM with PM passthrough.
transmission_channel: PC -> NC HCOE HOY HDY HNW NHSR PG PID PIBN PIBRE.

name: Government demand deflator
plain_english: Public-sector deflator; closes to PC.

name: Dwelling investment deflator
plain_english: Closes to a weighted average of PC and PM.

name: Non-mining investment deflator
plain_english: Closes to a weighted average of PC and PM.

name: Mining investment deflator
plain_english: Closes to PC.

name: Import deflator
plain_english: Closes to world export prices oil prices and the exchange rate.
transmission_channel: PM -> PMCG PC PG PID PIBN PXM PXO.

name: Consumer-good import deflator
plain_english: Sub-component of PM relevant to consumer-good prices.

name: Ownership transfer cost deflator
plain_english: Closes to PC.

name: Agricultural export deflator
plain_english: Closes to world agricultural prices and the USD rate.

name: Manufactured export deflator
plain_english: Closes to PM.

name: Other exports deflator
plain_english: Closes to PC and world commodity prices.

name: Mining export deflator
plain_english: Closes to world commodity prices in AUD terms.

name: Services export deflator
plain_english: Closes to PC.

name: Wage price index
plain_english: Wages Phillips curve in the unemployment gap with inflation expectations.
transmission_channel: PW -> PAE -> NHCOE HCOE RLC NULC -> labour-cost feedback.

name: Average earnings (national accounts)
plain_english: National-accounts measure of average compensation per hour.
transmission_channel: PAE -> NHCOE HCOE -> RC; RLC -> LE.

name: Nominal unit labour cost (Balassa-Samuelson adjusted)
plain_english: Balassa-Samuelson-adjusted unit labour cost.

name: Employment
plain_english: Total employment in persons; depends on output the real labour cost and trend hours.

name: Unemployment rate
plain_english: Quarterly change in the unemployment rate; closes to NAIRU via Okun's law plus real-unit-labour-cost dynamics.
transmission_channel: LUR -> LURGAP -> PW PTM NCR; LF.

name: Labour force participation rate
plain_english: Closes to employment over working-age population.

name: Working-age population
plain_english: Working-age population; closes to its trend.

name: Nominal cash rate
plain_english: Taylor rule in trimmed-mean inflation and the unemployment gap.
transmission_channel: NCR -> RCR N2R N10R NBR NMR -> RC PH NHC NHL.

name: 2-year bond yield
plain_english: Expectations-hypothesis term structure; error-corrects toward expected future short rates (RSTAR + PI_E + 0.52 of the current cash-rate gap) with persistence.

name: 10-year bond yield
plain_english: Expectations-hypothesis term structure; error-corrects toward expected future short rates (RSTAR + PI_E + 0.25 of the current cash-rate gap) plus a constant term premium.
transmission_channel: N10R -> IBCR (cost of capital for IBN).

name: Nominal business rate spread
plain_english: Spread of business borrowing rate over the cash rate; widens with unemployment gap.

name: Mortgage rate spread
plain_english: Spread of variable mortgage rate over the cash rate.
transmission_channel: NSP -> NMR RMR -> RC PH NHC.

name: Real trade-weighted exchange rate
plain_english: Real TWI; depends on terms of trade and the real-interest-rate spread to the world.
transmission_channel: RTWI -> NTWI NUSD REWI -> PM exports.

name: Nominal trade-weighted exchange rate
plain_english: Nominal TWI identity from real TWI plus relative prices.
transmission_channel: NTWI -> NUSD -> PXAG PXRE POIL PM.

name: AUD/USD exchange rate
plain_english: AUD/USD nominal exchange rate.

name: World GDP (US proxy)
plain_english: World GDP growth; AR(1) around steady-state world growth.

name: World CPI (US proxy)
plain_english: World CPI; closes to a 2.5% trend.

name: World export price (US proxy)
plain_english: World price of manufactured exports.

name: World agricultural prices
plain_english: Index of world agricultural commodity prices.

name: World commodity prices (energy + metals)
plain_english: Index of world commodity prices; closes to its long-run real value.

name: World oil price
plain_english: Index of world oil prices.

name: World real policy rate (US proxy)
plain_english: World real cash rate; mean-reverts to a steady-state value.

name: World real 2-year rate (US proxy)
plain_english: World real 2-year rate; spread to WRR.

name: Real GDP
plain_english: Y = RC + ID + IB + G + OTC - ATS + V + X - M + SD.
transmission_channel: Reported aggregate; feeds back into LE LUR via Okun.

name: Nominal GDP
plain_english: NY = NC + NID + NIB + NG + NOTC + NV + NX - NM - NATS + NSD.

name: Gross national expenditure
plain_english: GNE = DFD + V.

name: Nominal gross national expenditure
plain_english: NGNE = NDFD + NV.

name: Domestic final demand
plain_english: DFD = RC + ID + IB + G + OTC - ATS.

name: Total exports
plain_english: X = XM + XAG + XO + XRE + XS.

name: Nominal exports
plain_english: NX = NXM + NXS + NXO + NXRE + NXAG.

name: Terms of trade
plain_english: TOT = PX / PM * 100.

name: Output gap (capital-based)
plain_english: Capital-based output gap 100*(log Y - log YSTAR); negative = spare capacity. Diagnostic from the output_gap feature (parallel to LURGAP).

name: Potential output (CES)
plain_english: CES potential output inverted EMMA-style from capital + efficiency trend + potential employment. Diagnostic from the output_gap feature.

name: Gross national income
plain_english: GNI = NY + net primary income from abroad (NFOY); below NY for a net debtor. Diagnostic from external_accounting.

name: Current account deficit (pct GDP)
plain_english: Current account deficit as percent of GDP (trade balance + net primary income). Diagnostic from external_accounting.

name: Net foreign liabilities (pct GDP)
plain_english: Net foreign liabilities as percent of GDP (accumulated current account). Diagnostic from external_accounting.
transmission_channel: NFL_GDP -> RTWI only when fx_premium is on.

name: Gross operating surplus
plain_english: Gross operating surplus (income side of GDP) = NY minus compensation minus mixed income minus net product taxes. Diagnostic from income_side.

name: Profit share
plain_english: Gross operating surplus as percent of GDP(I). Diagnostic from income_side.

name: Labour share
plain_english: Compensation of employees as percent of GDP(I). Diagnostic from income_side.

name: Effective household tax rate
plain_english: Effective household income-tax rate (percent) = household income tax over primary income. Diagnostic from household_income.

name: Government net debt (pct GDP)
plain_english: Government net debt as percent of annual GDP. Diagnostic from fiscal_accounting (demo or reconciled mode).

name: Budget deficit (pct GDP)
plain_english: Government budget deficit as percent of GDP. Diagnostic from fiscal_accounting.

name: Cash rate (pre-floor)
plain_english: Taylor-rule cash rate BEFORE the effective-lower-bound floor; NCR is floored at 0.1. Add-factors declared on NCR are routed here. Present only when the elb_floor feature is on.
